transcript: Who takes more time in hair and make-up? That's an easy one. Who spends more time on their phone? Did you put you? No, I put you. Yeah, I was going to say, definitely me. Who drinks the most tea? Who is the bigger jicker? Paul never, never stops teasing everybody. Especially me. Who would win in a karaoke competition? A karaoke competition? I'm bored, because I can't sing a note. Neither can I. Who gets the last word? Who is the most competitive? Who is the most fun on a night out? What happens on Bake Off stays on Bake Off.
